entity.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange / liquidity protocol. HEI records Crema Finance as an active-or-research DEX record with event-backed history, centered on a July 2022 smart-contract exploit and later public reporting tying the unnamed DOJ case to Crema Finance.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0600 after event-backed review. The DOJ source does not name Crema Finance directly; Axios and CoinDesk are used to connect the public case and exploit reporting to Crema Finance. Improve later if archived official Crema Finance incident posts are found.

events.title: Crema Finance exploit reported
events.description: Crema Finance was reported to have suffered a smart-contract / flash-loan-related exploit in July 2022, with public reporting describing roughly $9 million affected.
events.notes: DOJ materials describe an unnamed Solana DEX; Axios identifies clues pointing to Crema Finance, and CoinDesk reports on the Crema Finance exploit and partial return of funds.

events.title: Attacker return and bounty arrangement reported
events.description: CoinDesk reported that the attacker returned almost $8 million to Crema Finance while retaining about $1.7 million as a bounty arrangement.
events.notes: This event records public reporting of the recovery/bounty arrangement, not an endorsement of its legal effect.

events.title: Crema Finance consolidated as DEX candidate
events.description: Crema Finance is consolidated from the DefiLlama candidate row into one DEX / protocol record.

evidence.title: Axios report tying unnamed Solana DEX case to Crema Finance
evidence.notes: Axios states that the indictment did not name the exchange but points to Crema Finance and describes the July 2022 attack context.

evidence.title: DOJ press release on unnamed Solana DEX smart-contract attack
evidence.notes: Official DOJ source for the unnamed Solana DEX smart-contract attack and alleged approximately $9 million loss. It does not name Crema Finance directly.

evidence.title: Crema Finance attacker returns almost $8M, keeps $1.7M bounty
evidence.notes: CoinDesk report naming Crema Finance and summarizing the exploit and fund-return arrangement.

evidence.title: CoinDesk recovery and bounty report for Crema Finance
evidence.notes: Source for reported return of almost $8 million and retained bounty amount.

evidence.title: Axios follow-up on post-exploit deal context
evidence.notes: Secondary source contextualizing the alleged post-exploit deal with the attacker.

evidence.title: DefiLlama DEX reference for Crema Finance
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0600.
